purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.text: This contract defines the Stage 3 handling bands for manual-only, approval-gated, and low-risk automatic work.

eligibility_rules.title: Eligibility Rules
items: deploy and rollback remain at least `approval-gated` unless another explicit contract narrows the rule
only repeated, reversible, low-blast-radius work may be considered for `low-risk-automatic`

guardrails.title: Guardrails
items: every automatic path must preserve incident refs, verification refs, and close-out provenance
every automatic path must still preserve a rollback path
lack of fresh evidence moves the work back out of `low-risk-automatic`

approval_rules.title: Approval Rules
items: band promotion from `manual-only` to `approval-gated` or `low-risk-automatic` requires explicit review
automation band changes may not be inferred from one successful repair

escalation_rules.title: Escalation Rules
items: any band ambiguity falls back to the stricter band
incidents involving approval-boundary drift immediately fall back to `manual-only`
